name: Lemon Rice Pilaf-Taste of Home Version
recipeIngredient: 1 cup uncooked long grain white rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the rice according to package directions.
2. In a skillet over medium heat, sauté the celery and onions in butter until tender.
3. Add the cooked rice, lemon peel, salt, and pepper; toss lightly.
4. Cook and stir until heated through.
Yield: 4-6 servings
